channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks on Wednesday night. The triple-double was Jokic’s NBA-leading 30th of the season.
item.dc:creator: CRAIG MEYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LeBron James beats buzzer with tip to lift Lakers past Pacers and keep record streak alive
item.description: LeBron James had a buzzer-beating tip-in to cap a 10-point fourth quarter, Luka Doncic scored 34 points and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Indiana Pacers 120-119 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has surgery for torn ACL in his left knee
item.description: Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving had surgery on the torn ACL in his left knee, starting a process of recovery that’s likely to continue into next season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Newly signed Russell Wilson says he expects to be the Giants' starting QB this upcoming season
item.description: Russell Wilson has bounced around the NFL the past few years, a one-time Super Bowl winner suddenly without a consistent home while facing doubts and critics about his play.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: TCU's Hailey Van Lith glad to have shared publicly about mental health issues she dealt with in past
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — TCU standout guard Hailey Van Lith said that while difficult, she is glad to have shared publicly about mental health struggles she said she dealt with early in her basketball career. “It’s been very positive.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL competition committee proposes moving touchback to 35 and making dynamic kickoff permanent
item.description: The NFL competition committee is recommending making the dynamic kickoff rule permanent and moving touchbacks to the 35-yard line in hopes of generating even more returns.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: U.S. figure skater Alysa Liu led after the short program on the opening night of the world championships on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dem lawmaker suggests females athletically equal to males while voting to keep trans athletes in girls sports
item.description: Pennsylvania Democrat state senator Lindsey Williams suggested that female athletes are physically comparable to male athletes and don't face disadvantages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Love affair back on at March Madness. Now with Arizona, Caleb Love takes on Duke again
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — He's back. If there's a single player Duke or any of its fans would love to not run into when the stakes are this high, Caleb Love would be that player. Love used to play for Duke's biggest rival, North Carolina. Now he plays for Duke's next opponent, Arizona.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Trump visit decision sends fans spiraling
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers fans on Tuesday were upset with the team's decision to visit President Donald Trump and celebrate their 2024 World Series win at the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Basketball legend fires back at 'big dummies' who ignored Caitlin Clark's immediate WNBA impact
item.description: Basketball legend Cheryl Miller hit out at critics who ignored the impact Caitlin Clark made during the 2024 WNBA season and talked about her race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz get crushed by Memphis, 140-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Just when you think things can sink any lower for the Utah Jazz, they get outscored by 38 points in the second half in a 140-103 blowout loss to the Memphis Grizzlies Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jerrod Calhoun signs new contract with USU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in three years, Utah State will not have to search for a new head basketball coach.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms relationship with Vanessa Trump
item.description: “Love is in the air and life is better with you by my side! We look forward to our journey through life together,” Woods said on X, where he has 6.4 million followers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Figure skating's world championships are headed to Boston, another chance to heal after DC crash
item.description: It has been nearly two months since American Airlines Flight 5342 lifted off from a wintry runway in southeast Kansas, destined for Washington, D.C., with dozens of members of the tight-knit figure skating community aboard it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James' return from injury spoiled by Bulls' phenomenal effort in 146-115 win over Lakers
item.description: Coby White scored 36 points, Josh Giddey flirted with a quadruple-double and the Chicago Bulls wrecked LeBron James' return from injury with an impressive 146-115 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: In March Madness, BYU gets a stop, then gets to go ... to Sweet 16 with 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: The BYU Cougars led the entire game Saturday but still had to make one, final defensive stop against Wisconsin's irrepressible guard, John Tonje, to seal a 91-89 victory over the Badgers and the program's first trip to the Sweet 16 since 2011 — the days of Jimmer Fredette.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 seed Houston holds off Gonzaga comeback, beats No. 8 seed Bulldogs 81-76 to reach Sweet 16
item.description: LJ Cryer matched a career high with 30 points, including two free throws with 14.2 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston held on to beat eighth-seeded Gonzaga 81-76 on Saturday night to reach the Sweet 16 for the sixth straight NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado Mesa Women's lacrosse team triumphs after early struggles
item.description: The Colorado Mesa University lacrosse team, led by head coach Ashley Delaney, has made a significant jump this season, overcoming a 1-4 start in nonconference play with two statement wins in RMAC competition.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: George Foreman, boxing legend and grill mogul, dead at 76
item.description: The family of George Foreman — the prolific pro boxer, Olympian and famed entrepreneur behind the George Foreman Grill — says the 76 year-old died Friday, March 21, "surrounded by loved ones.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, NewsNation

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks to build momentum as FC Dallas comes to town
item.description: Real Salt Lake, having won on the road against the Houston Dynamo last weekend, will welcome FC Dallas to America First Field on Saturday night with a chance to start a winning streak in front of their home fans.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Wisconsin back in March Madness win column, 85-66 over Montana
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Wisconsin backup forward Carter Gilmore made a sweet 3, then turned to the Montana fans and signaled for them to “shhhh.” Back on defense, he took a charge from one Montana player, then altered another’s shot.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Triton fever is spreading across UC San Diego
item.description: Triton fever is spreading across UC San Diego as the campus community is ready to see Michigan go down during Thursday‘s NCAA tournament matchup against the home team.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Alvarez, Fox 5
